name: Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc.
description: Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. is a leading manufacturer and marketer of high-quality home furnishings in the United States. Operating through a network of company-owned and licensed retail stores, as well as an e-commerce platform, the company offers a wide range of custom furniture, upholstery, and wood products. With a rich heritage dating back to 1902, Bassett is renowned for its craftsmanship, custom design options, and commitment to providing stylish, comfortable, and durable home decor solutions.
